name: Phyllo Chicken Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 small onion, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Rinse chicken with cold water and pat dry with paper towels. Cut into half-inch pieces and sprinkle with seasoned salt.
3. Spray a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium-high heat. Add chicken and onion and cook, stirring, for 5-7 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink.
4. Add potato, onion, carrot, 1/2 cup broth, poultry seasoning, and pepper. Bring to a boil. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 5-6 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Meanwhile, blend flour into remaining broth with a fork.
6. Blend the broth mixture into the vegetables. Cook, stirring, for 1-2 minutes, or until thickened. Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream; set aside.
7. On a work surface, layer phyllo sheets, brushing between layers with margarine, reserving a small amount for finishing the pie. Fit phyllo layers into spray-coated, deep 2-quart casserole.
8. Fill with chicken mixture. Fold edges of phyllo over filling; brush with remaining margarine.
9. Bake at 375°F for 35-45 minutes or until golden brown and filling bubbles.
